chart.prompt: Gesamtwert der Lieferantenbestellungen pro Monat, letzte 12 Monate
chart.sql_string:
WITH monthly_purchase_orders AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', po.date) AS month_start,
        SUM(po.total_amount) AS total_order_value_eur,
        COUNT(DISTINCT po.purchase_order_id) AS number_purchase_orders
    FROM purchase_orders po
    WHERE po.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled')
      AND po.date BETWEEN DATEADD(month, -11, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AND CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Monat",
    ROUND(COALESCE(total_order_value_eur, 0), 2) AS "Gesamtwert Lieferantenbestellungen (EUR)",
    COALESCE(number_purchase_orders, 0) AS "# Bestellungen"
FROM monthly_purchase_orders
ORDER BY "Monat";

en.title: Purchase volume (monthly)
en.description: Total purchase-order value created per month over the last twelve months — sourcing-spend rhythm at a glance.

de.title: Einkaufsvolumen (Monat)
de.description: Gesamtwert der Lieferantenbestellungen pro Monat der letzten zwölf Monate — Einkaufs-Rhythmus auf einen Blick.
